calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Josephine Vangelisti.

Mr. Madden explained that there were two couples (parents, and a daughter and her husband), that they owned a building 50% each (couple) as tenants in common, that the husband of Josephine died and that he did a spousal property petition to have his interest transferred to her. Mr. Madden also stated that the same issue of the petitioner acting as administrator through her attorney-in-fact came up in the Guido estate, that the attorney-in-fact is the sole beneficiary, that the same issue has been briefed twice and that the order appointing Josephine by her attorney-in-fact in the Guido Estate was signed by this Court. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
